text:
There's no **Settings tab** on your results page — but I bet you're looking for the **Setup tab**! 

Here are the 6 tabs available on your results page:

1. **Overview** — Where you are now; high-level metrics, competitive intel, citation status
2. **Scorecard** — All audit pillars with scores and findings
3. **Recommendations** — Prioritized fixes sorted by impact
4. **Pages** — Per-page analysis (Pro feature)
5. **History** — Timeline of your audit runs
6. **Setup** — **This is where you get everything:** generated deployment files (llms.txt, business.json, schema blocks), domain verification, and platform-specific integration code

The **Setup tab** is your go-to for implementing fixes on example.com. It will show you WordPress-specific code and files to deploy.

What are you trying to do? I can walk you through the Setup tab or help with any of your audit findings. 😊
